code:
import io
import string

fn is_ws(_ b: Int) -> Bool
  b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 13 or b == 10 or b == 11 or b == 12
end

fn has_non_ws(_ s: String) -> Bool
  let n = string.len(s)
  mut i = 0
  mut found = false
  while i < n
    match string.byte_at(s, i)
    when Some(b)
      if not is_ws(b)
        found = true
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  found
end

let input = io.read_to_end()
let lines = string.split(input, "\n")
let total = lines.len()
mut last = -1
mut i = 0
while i < total
  match lines.get(i)
  when Some(line)
    if has_non_ws(line)
      last = i
    end
  when None
    ()
  end
  i = i + 1
end

if last < 0
  println("(none)")
else
  match lines.get(last)
  when Some(line)
    println(line)
  when None
    ()
  end
end
